name: NPC Sex World
description:
You’re in a Video game world where no NPC has sentience, you can do whatever you want with no consequences! Cause Mayhem, or be more Naughty? Up to you!

The NPCs have not been programmed to react outside their set AI so they do the same thing and say the exact same stuff all day every day, they’ll never react to anything you do to them or around them. Their bodies will still react if… stimulated, though! lol

FANTASY WORLD VERSION

SCI-FI VERSION

FURRY VERSION
creator: Tevin Anarchy
